---
title: "Continuous_Exploration_GCC-VWC-SR"
author: "Kathy Condon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggtext)
library(ggh4x)
library(ggpattern)
library(data.table)
library(MuMIn)
library(scales)
library(performance)
library(googledrive)
```

```{r set file directories - local}
dir.create(file.path("deluge"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data","R_exports"))
dir.create(file.path("deluge","figures"))
```

```{r read in continuous files - choose 2 to refresh connection}
drive.files<-googledrive::drive_ls(googledrive::as_id("https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dmzGwkGC1Y4uWW8nLXDkhtB_4A4suyF3?usp=drive_link"))

cont.files<-c("GCC_filtered.csv","SR_filtered.csv","VWC_20cm_filtered.csv")

## read in each file
for (i in cont.files){
  
file.name<-drive.files %>% 
  dplyr::filter(name == i) 

# if-else, to throw error if file name is incorrect or error would otherwise stop loop
if(nrow(file.name) == 1){
  googledrive::drive_download(file = file.name$id, 
                              overwrite = T,
                              path = file.path("deluge", 'data', i))
  
} else{
  message("File error - check name or if duplicated: ", i)
  }
}

```

```{r check files}
GCC<-read.csv("deluge/data/GCC_filtered.csv")
str(GCC)

VWC<-read.csv("deluge/data/VWC_20cm_filtered.csv")
str(VWC)

SR<-read.csv("deluge/data/SR_filtered.csv")
str(SR)
```

```{r daily over gs}
dat<-GCC%>%
  mutate(var=GCC)
# dat<-VWC%>%
#   mutate(var=VWC)
# dat<-SR%>%
#   mutate(var=efflux)

str(dat)

cleanup.dat<-dat%>%
  mutate(new.date=as.Date(date,format="%Y-%m-%d"),
         trt=factor(trt),
         Study_shorthand=factor(Study_shorthand))%>%
  mutate(yr=year(new.date),
         mon=month(new.date))

str(cleanup.dat)

daily.avs<-cleanup.dat%>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand,new.date,yr,trt)%>%
  filter(!is.na(var))%>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    plots.per.trt=n(),
    av=mean(var),
    sd=sd(var),
    SE=sd/sqrt(plots.per.trt))%>%
  mutate(trt_type=if_else(grepl("DEL",trt),"DEL","CON"))%>%
  mutate(Study_trt=paste(Study_shorthand,trt,sep=": "))

head(daily.avs,5)

## graph 
ggplot(daily.avs,aes(x=new.date,y=av,group=trt,linetype=trt_type,color=Study_trt)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=av-SE, ymax=av+SE), width=0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~Study_shorthand+yr, scales="free_x") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels="%b %d") +
  labs(
    x="Date",
    y="Mean",
    linetype="Treatment")+
  theme_bw()

```

# fix mary's data
-- fill in both years with deluge size and correct dates -- DONE
-- finish merging file -- DELUGE CHARACTERISTICS FILE READY TO GO
-- plot all of them -- CAN DO NEXT
